scripts.dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/kill-dev-ports.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock') { Remove-Item 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock' -Force }" && turbo run dev --concurrency=20
scripts.dev:web: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/kill-dev-ports.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock') { Remove-Item 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock' -Force }" && turbo run dev --concurrency=20 --filter web-client --filter @lms/auth-service --filter @lms/course-service --filter @lms/learning-service --filter @lms/community-service --filter @lms/media-service --filter @lms/notification-service --filter @lms/payment-service --filter @lms/env-validator --filter @lms/logger --filter @lms/types --filter @lms/kafka-client
scripts.dev:web:lite: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/kill-dev-ports.ps1 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock') { Remove-Item 'apps/web-client/.next/dev/lock' -Force }" && turbo run dev --concurrency=10 --filter web-client --filter @lms/auth-service --filter @lms/course-service --filter @lms/community-service --filter @lms/env-validator --filter @lms/logger --filter @lms/types --filter @lms/kafka-client
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm docker:up && pnpm setup:db && pnpm seed
